title: Extract an async-safe helper with sandbox allowance
prompt: Write a test helper module `MyApp.TestTaskHelpers` at `test/support/test_task_helpers.ex` that defines `allow_and_async/2` taking `(task_supervisor, fun)` and: (1) spawns `Task.Supervisor.async_nolink(task_supervisor, fun)`, (2) gets the task pid from the returned Task struct, (3) calls `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.allow(MyApp.Repo, self(), task.pid)`, (4) returns the task. This keeps async: true safe across spawned tasks.
tier_rationale: Helper module with a specific signature and API composition.
